notes: Repo's %checkfreq / %checkfreq2 sample-size-check macros (verbatim), called on the same factor set (age8, raceeth4, ru2, region, and the age3*sex / raceeth4*sex / insurance2*age3 / insurance2*raceeth4 crosses) and stacked with the pipeline's 'count<20 -> insufficient' rule from %weights_national(). A 20-row synthetic analysis extract stands in for the P: libname EHR file; pipe-delimited datalines so the ru2 category keeps its embedded space.
